currentTask.context: Director session starting - reading feedback and deciding next action

gameQueue.title: Moonshine Run
gameQueue.concept: Outlaw distiller evades revenue agents: manage three still gauges (heat, pressure, proof) while revenuer lanterns sweep the darkness. Dim your own light to hide, but lose visibility of your gauges. Stealth + resource management hybrid.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First stealth mechanic in the series, first multi-gauge simultaneous resource management, first game where visibility is both tool and threat

gameQueue.title: Rope Trick
gameQueue.concept: Precision rope-throwing puzzle: tap-hold-release to lasso rotating targets at different distances. A physics-based rope arc, wind drift, and moving target patterns create a skill ceiling that rewards mastery of distance and timing.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First physics-arc projectile mechanic, first game with wind-drift environmental variable, highest precision skill ceiling in the series

gameQueue.title: Dead Man's Hand
gameQueue.concept: Texas Hold'em-style poker against 3 AI outlaws with distinct bluffing personalities. Read tells, manage a bounty chip stack, survive a 5-hand showdown. First card game in the series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First card game mechanic, first multi-opponent AI with distinct behavioral models, first game with narrative personality-driven opponents

runLog.summary: Built Game 06: Cattle Drive (cattle-drive.html). Flocking AI, wolf predators, 13 tests pass.
Built Game 07: Tin Star Showdown (tin-star-showdown.html). Quick-draw duel, best-of-3, AI difficulty scaling, 13 tests pass.
Built Game 08: Dust Devil (dust-devil.html). 2-axis physics tumbleweed, tap-to-gust canyon navigation, 14 tests pass.
Built Game 09: Wanted Poster. Memory/deduction face-ID mechanic, procedural face system, 15 tests pass.
Built Game 10: Gold Rush - lantern-lit cave mining, BFS pathfinding, triple resource management, 16 tests pass.
Built Game 11: Boot Hill Bluff - turn-based bluffing duel with AI tell system, narrative choices, chip betting. 18 tests pass.
Built Game 12: Stampede - first-person buffalo stampede, 3-lane dodge, signal herd mechanic. 23 tests pass.
Built Game 13: Snake Oil - frontier medicine wagon, match ingredients to ailments, NPC dialogue, 30 tests pass.
Built Game 14: Midnight Rodeo - bareback bull-riding, directional tap-match, crowd energy multiplier, 31 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: taps now register at any time during play, not just the 0.7s telegraph window. Pre-tap preserved across phase transitions.
Built Game 15: Prairie Fire - wildfire cellular automaton, 18x26 grid, wind-direction spread, firebreak+water placement, 35 tests pass.
